official_functions.role: Construct the official Play clientbound set_border_warning_delay fixture
Write, decode, and observe the official warning-delay body
Name the packet id assigned in Play clientbound state

invariants: The official Play clientbound table assigns set_border_warning_delay to packet id 0x5b.
The official Play clientbound protocol codec dispatches the set_border_warning_delay id to ClientboundSetBorderWarningDelayPacket.
The official set_border_warning_delay body is one warning-delay VarInt.
The fixture uses one primitive WorldBorder warning-time field only and does not require initialized Level, UI, or runtime world-border state.

The framed bytes, packet table id, body bytes, decoded packet class, decoded warning delay, Play clientbound packet table, and remaining decode byte counts are generated by the official jar-backed answer artifact.
This contract does not prove warning UI behavior, world-border runtime behavior, render readiness, or client-load completion.
test_topology_note: rust_test_target names the current case adapter only; the manifest owns the runnable test topology.
stop_boundary: Do not use this framed dispatch/decode contract to infer warning UI behavior, world-border runtime behavior, render readiness, or client-load completion.
